DTR | Listen to a Speaker Support an Opinion
LSO-MS8-L1-6501000-MSMATH8-AGS-EUR-02 | MS Math: Grade 8 | Two-Way Frequency Tables | Academic Game Show | European Historical & Contemporary Contexts
Two Sides of the Map
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between two students. The girl is discussing her opinion about how the team should study for the Academic Game Show. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer four questions about the conversation and the evidence the girl gives to support her opinion.
Listen to the Conversation
1 QUESTION 1:
Why does the girl bring up the team's results from last weekend's tournament?
2 QUESTION 2:
How did the girl figure out how the team did on each kind of question?
3 QUESTION 3:
What does the girl's table show about the team's answers?
4 QUESTION 4:
What does the girl conclude from her table?
Answer all 4 questions to submit.
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
